subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us, and from it We perceived the fragrance of sincerity unto God, the Lord of the worlds, and We have responded unto thee through this epistle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و وجدنا منه عرف الخلوص لله رب العالمین و اجبناک بهذا الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment
